title: selago glandulosa
intro: Selago glandulosa, also known as Cape pegtop, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selago glandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
